rulings.Case Title: HERNANDEZ VS BURLINGAME FORD
rulings.Rulings: 1.DENY IMPROPER VENUE: DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED RIGHT TO CHALLENGE ISSUE OF IMPROPER VENUE BECAUSE HE DID NOT FILE THE MOTION WITHIN TIME PERMITTED TO FILE AN ANSWER/DEMURRER. 2.DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND ENDS OF JUSTICE: DEFENDANT HAS CHALLENGED VENUE ON THESE GROUNDS PREMATURELY. THIS MOTION MAY ONLY BE MADE AFTER FILING AN ANSWER. (302/AJR/RS)
